hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ModelBindingCommandHandler.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: TestOut: It's like a campout for your tests!

options.name: mode
options.description:
The mode to run in.  This is required.  For console running, this can be a comma seperated list of modes.  If running as a service,
this must be either 'Agent' or 'Server'

options.name: server-url
options.description:
The server URL that this will either host at for server mode, or connect to for agent or runner.
This should be of the form https://SomeHost.

options.name: base-path
options.description:
Only used for Runner.  The base path for the tests to run in.  Everything in this path will be
distributed to all agents.  If this isn't given, the folder that the --test-assembly parameter points to wil be used.

options.name: test-assembly
options.description: Only used for Runner.  The assembly to search for tests.

options.name: result-filename
options.description: Only used for Runner.  The filename to aggregate the test results into.

options.name: batch-size
options.description:
Only used for Server.  The number of tests per thread to include in a batch.  For the default
batch size of 10, this means if an agent has 8 threads, then it will be passed 80 tests (10 tests per thread, 8 threads)
to process.  This is a very rough way to level the tests passed to each
agent based on their processing power.

options.name: max-retry-count
options.description: Only used for Runner.  The maximum number of times to re-run a failed test.

options.name: compress-file-transfers
options.description: Specifies that any transfers into this console should be compressed.  Defaults to false.

options.name: test-inactivity-timeout
options.description:
Only used for Runner.  The maximum amount of seconds that a test can process without giving any
feedback before being considered dead.

options.name: verbose
options.description:
Sets internal testout logging level to debug. Note this will get quite noisy and is only recommended
for diagnostics, not day to day running.

options.name: log-folder
options.description:
The folder to output logs.  Logs will be in the folder format testout-yyyyMMdd.log.
Setting this to 'NONE' will disable logging.  Leaving this empty will log under the system appdata folder.

options.name: max-workers
options.description: Only used for the Agent.  The maximum number of test workers.  Defaults to the machine core count if null.

options.name: working-folder
options.description:
The path to use for storing testout working data.  If this is not set, this defaults to Environment.SpecialFolder.CommonApplicationData\TestOut when
run interactively, or Environment.SpecialFolder.LocalApplicationData\TestOut when run as a service.

options.name: as-service
options.description: Used when installed using sc.exe on windows.  Modifies hosting slightly to work as a windows service.
